title: Smoked Eggplant and Courgette Fritters
description: A Mediterranean-inspired fritter made with smoked eggplant and courgette, perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Peel the melanzane and slice into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Smoke the melanzane slices until slightly charred.
Grate the infused courgette in a bowl.
Add the flour, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, eggs, garlic, salt, and black pepper to the bowl with the courgette.
Add the smoked melanzane slices to the bowl and mix gently.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 8-10 fritters.
Place the fritters on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
